Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Barbara Helphrey's Motion to Extend Jurisdiction of Arbitrator and continue Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
